summary: Comprehensive testing of billing upgrade flow features: Admin One-Time Rates & Coupons CRUD, Partner Plan & Billing upgrade flows. All 41 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified.

issues: Coupon field is conditionally rendered only when subtotal > 0 — this is correct UX behavior but may surprise users entering coupon before quantity

critical_code_review_comments: Admin.tsx: isPlatformAdmin correctly includes platform_super_admin role. isPartnerAdmin excludes platform admins — platform admins (admin@automateaccounts.local) CANNOT see the Plan & Billing tab. Tested with testpartner@example.com (partner_super_admin). This is intentional separation of concerns.
CouponField component in PlanBillingTab.tsx uses same data-testid='coupon-code-input' for both OngoingUpgradeDialog and OneTimeUpgradeModal — could cause flaky tests but functionally correct.
OneTimeUpgradeModal conditionally renders CouponField only when subtotal > 0 (subtotal > 0 check) — correct UX behavior.
seed_data_creation: Created SAVE10 coupon (10% off, Both, 2027-12-31, per-org) and Orders/month rate (GBP 1.00) for testing. Both left in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All billing upgrade features tested and working. Backend: /api/admin/one-time-plans, /api/admin/coupons, /api/partner/coupons/validate, /api/partner/one-time-rates, /api/partner/upgrade-plan-ongoing, /api/partner/one-time-upgrade. Frontend: Admin Plans tab 3-section nav (License Plans|One-Time Rates|Coupons), full CRUD for rates and coupons, Free Trial locked buttons, Partner Plan & Billing with 2 upgrade flows both verified. Test partner: testpartner@example.com / TestPass123! / test-partner-co (Starter plan, can upgrade to Professional).

features_verified.admin_plans_tab_3_sections: PASS - License Plans | One-Time Rates | Coupons tab navigation working
features_verified.one_time_rates_crud: PASS - Create Orders/month GBP 1.00, visible in table, edit to 1.50, delete confirmed
features_verified.coupons_crud: PASS - Create SAVE10 (10%, both, 2027-12-31, per-org), visible in table, edit to 15%
features_verified.free_trial_default_badge: PASS - Default badge visible, Delete/Deactivate buttons disabled
features_verified.partner_plan_billing_two_sections: PASS - Upgrade Plan (ongoing) and Extra Limits (One-Time) sections both visible
features_verified.ongoing_upgrade_dialog: PASS - Opens on 'Upgrade to Professional' click, shows flat diff GBP 50.00, coupon input, Apply button, Pay & Upgrade button
features_verified.one_time_upgrade_modal: PASS - Opens on 'Buy Extra Limits' click, shows module table (Orders/month), quantity input, subtotal updates, coupon field (conditional on subtotal > 0), Pay & Activate button
